document_title: White Paper Zoran - Rapport d'Audit Final et Analyse Stratégique
author: AIStudio Red Team (Lead Auditor)
notes: Manifests generated by AI assistant on behalf of user. These files should be timestamped by an independent Time-Stamp Authority (TSA) and optionally notarized or certified via an independent third-party for non-repudiation.
recommended_next_steps: Obtain RFC3161 timestamp for the PDF and manifest files.
Apply PAdES digital signature to the PDF using a qualified certificate.
Store artifacts in WORM/Write-Once storage and back up across multiple jurisdictions.
Deliver copies and manifests to independent third-party auditor and obtain signed attestation.
